tool_name: Electroplating Bath — Faraday Deposition Rate, Plating Time & Rectifier Power

inputs.name: Total Part Surface Area to be Plated (A_part)
inputs.note: 1 dm² = 100 cm² = 0.01 m²; measure exposed area only

inputs.name: Required Plating Thickness (δ)
inputs.note: ISO 2081 Zn: Fe/Zn 8c = 8 µm; Fe/Zn 25c = 25 µm; EN ISO 4527 Ni: min 25 µm
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 286-1:2010 §4 — Design specification nominal, zero measurement uncertainty

inputs.name: Metal to be Deposited
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 2768-1:1989 — Nominal/material selection, no measurement uncertainty

inputs.name: Applied Current Density (i)
inputs.note: Zinc acid bath: 2–6 A/dm²; decorative Cr: 15–25 A/dm²; hard Cr: 25–60 A/dm²; Au (connector): 0.1–0.5 A/dm²
inputs.uncertainty_source: JCSS PMC Part 3 — Material density: CoV=0.01-0.03

inputs.name: Cathode Current Efficiency (η_c)
inputs.note: Zn acid: 95–99%; Ni sulfamate: 95–98%; Cr (hexavalent): 10–25%; Cu sulfate: 95–100%

inputs.name: Cell (Bath) Voltage (U_cell)
inputs.note: Zn ≈ 4–8 V; Ni ≈ 5–8 V; decorative Cr ≈ 6–12 V; hard Cr ≈ 12–24 V
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 21748:2017 §7.3 — Default Type B: ±5% for unclassified parameters

formulas: const METALS = {Zn:{rho:7.13,M:65.38,n:2}, Ni:{rho:8.91,M:58.69,n:2}, Cr:{rho:7.19,M:52.0,n:6}, Cu:{rho:8.96,M:63.55,n:2}, Au:{rho:19.32,M:197.0,n:1}, Ag:{rho:10.49,M:107.87,n:1}}; const m = METALS[metal_deposited]; E_eq_g_Ah = m.M / (m.n * 26.8)   // [g/A·h] Metal Electrochemical Equivalent (E_eq) — Faraday's Law Reference: Faraday's law: E_eq = M/(n·F/3600) = M/(n·26.8); F=96485 C/mol — ISO 2081 §3.7

const m2 = METALS[metal_deposited]; r_dep_um_min = E_eq_g_Ah * current_density_a_dm2 * cathode_efficiency_pct / 100 * 10000 / (m2.rho * 60)   // [µm/min] Deposition Rate at Given Current Density (r_dep) Reference: r = E_eq·i·η_c / (ρ·60) [µm/min]; i in A/dm², ρ in g/cm³ — Faraday deposition rate
t_plate_min = target_thickness_um / r_dep_um_min   // [min] Required Plating Time (t_plate) Reference: t = δ / r_dep — ASTM B633 §10; batch cycle time determination
I_rect_a = current_density_a_dm2 * part_surface_area_dm2   // [A] Total Rectifier Current Required (I_rect) Reference: I = i × A_cathode — total current for all parts in bath simultaneously

P_rect_kw = I_rect_a * bath_voltage_v / 1000; E_spec_kw_dm2 = P_rect_kw / part_surface_area_dm2   // [kW, kW/dm²] Rectifier Power & Specific Energy Consumption Reference: P = U_cell × I; specific energy = P/A — rectifier sizing basis per MIL-STD-171

const m3 = METALS[metal_deposited]; W_deposit_g = E_eq_g_Ah * I_rect_a * t_plate_min / 60 * cathode_efficiency_pct / 100; W_anode_g = W_deposit_g / (cathode_efficiency_pct / 100) * 1.05   // [g] Metal Mass Deposited per Batch & Anode Consumption Reference: W = E_eq·I·t·η_c; anode consumption ≈ W_deposit / η_c × 1.05 (5% drag-out and oxidation loss)

V1.error_msg: Cathode efficiency < 20% for non-chromium process: abnormally low — check bath chemistry pH, temperature, and additive concentrations

V2.error_msg: Current density > 60 A/dm² for Cr: hard chrome territory — bath temperature control critical (50–60°C); burning and pitting risk above CD limit

V3.error_msg: Plating time > 2 hours: very long cycle — evaluate higher current density, tank agitation, or split into two baths; bath conductivity and thermal management critical for extended runs

smart_warnings.message: Chromium cathode efficiency > 30%: unusually high for hexavalent Cr bath — verify input; trivalent Cr (Cr³⁺) baths achieve 80–95% efficiency but require different parameters
Rectifier current > 10,000 A: industrial-scale rectifier — specify thyristor or IGBT rectifier with ±1% voltage regulation; busbar cross-section critical for voltage uniformity
High power input at elevated bath temperature: Joule heating will raise bath temperature — specify bath cooling system capacity as Q_cool ≈ P_rect × 0.6 kW
Gold plating > 5 µm: very high material cost — verify specification requires full gold; consider gold flash (0.5 µm) over nickel undercoat for connector applications per MIL-G-45204
Low CD on large area: very long plating time — evaluate rack density, multiple simultaneous racks, or continuous plating line for high-volume parts

fmea.effect: Cathode efficiency < 20% for non-chromium process: abnormally low — check bath chemistry pH, temperature, and additive concentrations
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: Current density > 60 A/dm² for Cr: hard chrome territory — bath temperature control critical (50–60°C); burning and pitting risk above CD limit
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: Plating time > 2 hours: very long cycle — evaluate higher current density, tank agitation, or split into two baths; bath conductivity and thermal management critical for extended runs
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Chromium cathode efficiency > 30%: unusually high for hexavalent Cr bath — verify input; trivalent Cr (Cr³⁺) baths achieve 80–95% efficiency but require different parameters
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: metal_deposited === 'Cr' && cathode_efficiency_pct > 30

fmea.failureMode: Rectifier current > 10,000 A: industrial-scale rectifier — specify thyristor or IGBT rectifier with ±1% voltage regulation; busbar cross-section critical for voltage uniformity
High power input at elevated bath temperature: Joule heating will raise bath temperature — specify bath cooling system capacity as Q_cool ≈ P_rect × 0.6 kW
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: P_rect_kw > 100 && bath_temperature_c > 50

fmea.failureMode: Gold plating > 5 µm: very high material cost — verify specification requires full gold; consider gold flash (0.5 µm) over nickel undercoat for connector applications per MIL-G-45204
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: metal_deposited === 'Au' && target_thickness_um > 5

fmea.failureMode: Low CD on large area: very long plating time — evaluate rack density, multiple simultaneous racks, or continuous plating line for high-volume parts
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: current_density_a_dm2 < 1 && part_surface_area_dm2 > 1000
